name: ccfddl-skills
description: Agent skills for querying ccfddl conference deadline data.

interface.shortDescription: Query conference deadlines and ranks from ccfddl.
interface.longDescription: Helps coding agents answer research submission planning questions using ccfddl YAML data, including deadline search, rank/category filters, domain mappings, acceptance-rate overlays, and calendar export.
defaultPrompt: Find open CCF-A AI conferences in the next 180 days.
When is the next ICML deadline?
Find CV conferences for an image editing paper.
